PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Continued To Apr-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Linda Roland (Petitioner/Proposed Administrator).
Edward Roland in Propria Persona.
Yvonnette Roland (Heir) in Propria Persona.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 6, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 11, 2018. The Petition for Instructions and Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to and the Parties are to return on April 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
